next_steps: Perform urgent bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage (BAL) for fungal, mycobacterial, and bacterial cultures, as well as cytology and silver stain
Obtain serum Histoplasma antigen and serum Cryptococcal antigen testing
Start empirical treatment for severe PJP with high-dose trimethoprim-sulfamethoxazole and systemic corticosteroids
Initiate broad-spectrum empiric antibiotics for bacterial pneumonia and sepsis
Assess arterial blood gas to determine the oxygenation index and the necessity for mechanical ventilation
Delay initiation of antiretroviral therapy until the underlying opportunistic infection is identified and stable to prevent IRIS
Send blood cultures for fungal, mycobacterial, and bacterial organisms
